title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_diff
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_diff' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

base.description: Base ref (e.g. "main", "HEAD~3"). Required for range diffs. If omitted and `staged: false`, shows unstaged changes.

head.description: Head ref (e.g. "feature-branch"). If omitted, defaults to HEAD. Only used if `base` is provided.

path.description: Scope diff to a single file path (e.g. "src/main.ts"). For multiple files, prefer `paths`. If both `path` and `paths` are given, they are unioned.

paths.description: Scope diff to multiple file paths (e.g. ["src/a.ts", "src/b.ts"]). Each path is validated and must lie within the repository root. If both `path` and `paths` are given, they are unioned.

staged.description: If true, show staged changes (git diff --staged). Ignored if `base` is provided.

unified.description: Number of context lines to show around each change (passed as -U<n> to git diff). Defaults to git's built-in default (3). Use 0 for no context.
